creator: dcarmich@dcarmichael.net
text:
I saw some serious issues with 12.0.2 on VMware Fusion 4.1.1 (the =
current production release), but it seems to work on the Technology =
Preview.

Should 12.x drivers be in -CURRENT with caveats?

On Mar 30, 2012, at 8:30 AM, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/166514'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.=20
